title: June is the Garden Month in Menton | Mas du Chanoine
description: June is the Garden Month in Menton: French Riviera event near our guesthouse.

breadcrumb.label: June is the Garden Month in Menton

paragraphs: Menton houses several remarkable gardens classified as historical monuments. Created in the 19th century or the 1920s, they include the Garden Serre de la Madone (6 hectares), the Garden Fontana Rosa dedicated to 19th century writers, the exotic botanical garden of Val Rameh, and the Garden Maria Serena palm grove.
eventName: June is the Garden Month in Menton
